zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Torun Thorn於1388年8月15日出生在波蘭度盧n斯吉時，他的父親Stefan Torun29歲，母親Gilda Slavic27歲。他於1425年5月15日與Elizabeth Mary McKillop在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年12月29日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可 韋斯特享年63歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭音巴可萊德格林可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Torun Thorn于1388年8月15日出生在波兰度盧n斯吉时，他的父亲Stefan Torun29岁，母亲Gilda Slavic27岁。他于1425年5月15日与Elizabeth Mary McKillop在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年12月29日在苏格兰雷福福爾格林可 韋斯特享年63岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰音巴可萊德格林可。

en.Thorn, Thorn, West Prussia, Prussia, Ger: Thorn, Thorn, West Prussia, Prussia, Germany

nameMeanings.name: Thorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thorner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Fritzi, Ilse.
German (Thörner): topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Thorn (see Thorn 3 and 4).
German: occupational name for a watchman on a tower.

variants.name: Thorns
meanings: North German (Lower Saxony): variant of   Thorn  .

English (Sussex, Yorkshire and Staffordshire): variant of Thorne with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There are various minor places called Thorns or Thornes, including Thornes in Wakefield (Yorkshire) and Thornes in Stonnall (Staffordshire), which appear to be principal sources of the surname.

variants.name: Thorne
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: Torun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘young, tender’, used especially of the newly risen sun and of young plants; also ‘tenderness of feelings’ or ‘affection’.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Torun Thorn was born on 15 August 1388, in Toruń, Poland, his father, Stefan Torun, was 29 and his mother, Gilda Slavic, was 27. He married Elizabeth Mary McKillop on 15 May 1425, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 December 1451, in Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Greenock, Inverclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Torun Thorn est né le 15 août 1388, à toruńskie, Pologne, son père, Stefan Torun, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gilda Slavic, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mary McKillop le 15 mai 1425, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1451, à Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Greenock, Inverclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Torun Thorn am 15. August 1388 in toruńskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stefan Torun 29 und seine Mutter Gilda Slavic 27. Er hat am 15. Mai 1425 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland Elizabeth Mary McKillop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1451 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Greenock, Inverclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Torun Thorn è nato il il 15 agosto 1388 nel toruńskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Stefan Torun, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Gilda Slavic, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mary McKillop il 15 maggio 1425, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 dicembre 1451, nel Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Greenock, Inverclyde, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Torun Thornが1388年8月15日にポーランドトルnスキで生まれた時，父Stefan Torunは29歳，母Gilda Slavicは27歳であった。1425年5月15日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでElizabeth Mary McKillopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年12月29日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノック ウエストで63歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドインバークリドグレエノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Torun Thorn(이)가 1388년 8월 15일 폴란드 토루n스키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stefan Torun(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Gilda Slavic(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1425년 5월 15일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Elizabeth Mary McKillop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 12월 29일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크 웨스트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 인버c리드 그린옥크에 묻혔다.

pt.15 Aug 1388–29 Dec 1451: 15 de agosto de 1388–29 de dezembro de 1451
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Torun Thorn nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1388, em toruńskie, Polônia, seu pai, Stefan Torun, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gilda Slavic, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mary McKillop em 15 de maio de 1425, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1451, em Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Greenock, Inverclyde, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Torun Thorn родился 15 августа 1388 г. в местности торуnски, Польша, его отцу по имени Stefan Torun было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gilda Slavic, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mary McKillop 15 мая 1425 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 декабря 1451 г. в местности гринокк вест, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности гринокк, инвирклид, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.15 Aug 1388–29 Dec 1451: 15 de agosto de 1388–29 de diciembre de 1451
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Torun Thorn nació el 15 de agosto de 1388, en toruńskie, Polonia, su papá, Stefan Torun, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Gilda Slavic, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mary McKillop el 15 de mayo de 1425, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1451, en Greenock West, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Greenock, Inverclyde, Escocia, Reino Unido.
